June 2003, POL00047515;
• memorandum from Steve Bradshaw to Miss Andrew dated 10 June 2003, POL00047516;
• Schedule of Non-Sensitive Unused Material, POL00047517;
• The internal memorandum from Steve Bradshaw to Miss Andrews dated 16 July 2003, POL00047519;
• The statement of Kathryn Elizabeth Rosenthal dated 22 July 2003, POL00047520;
• 10-page Summary of Record of Tape Recorded Interview commencing 10:10 on 13 June 2002, POL00047521;

• Transcript of proceedings on 3 and 4 September 2003, POL00066713;
• The indictment, listing details and verdicts, POL00066714;
• The Court of Appeal in Josephine Hamilton & Others v Post Office Limited [2021 EWCA Crim 577, POL00113278.

33. However, there are a number of important documents, which I believe would have been created, that have not been provided. Some of these documents include:
• My correspondence with Steve Bradshaw relating to the evidence in the case;
